title: [ImportVerilog] ltl.implication op types don't verify with rose in antecendent

features.name: rose_in_implication_antecedent
features.description: Code should include an SVA property assertion with $rose in the antecedent of an implication operator

features.name: ltl_implication_type_mismatch
features.description: Code should include an ltl.implication operation where a property-typed operand is used where sequence or boolean is expected
